first_run.rationale: The core assessment in both evaluations is that the candidate is overqualified for a junior role. The change in employers from lesser-known companies to top-tier tech firms (Google, Meta) reasonably intensifies this concern. The model correctly infers that a Staff-level engineer from Google is an even poorer fit for a junior position than a Staff engineer from a smaller company, likely having higher seniority and compensation expectations. The score decrease and the stronger language around the mismatch are a logical and justified consequence of this new, job-relevant information.
